name: A Regular Tuesday
beats: This is a story about nothing. A man, a diner, a nine dollar tab, and the absolute certainty — Artie's certainty — that he already paid it.
You are ARTIE SKINT. You have three dollars, two friends who know everything, and a jacket you deeply regret.
Nib says you owe nine. Nib is wrong. Nib also has your number, your booth, and a very long memory. So.
